description_for_human: מסכי LED ושילוט דיגיטלי לעסקים בישראל — Pixel by Keshet
description_for_model: Pixel by Keshet is an Israeli company specializing in LED screens and digital signage for businesses. They provide indoor and outdoor LED displays, digital billboards, CMS software, installation and support. Located in Petah Tikva, Israel. Phone: *9555. Website: https://xvision.co.il
